summary: Changed-code gates passed. Repository-wide pnpm test and pnpm lint still expose known baseline/config debt unrelated to this task-filter accessibility change.

commands.baseline_issue: All collected assertions passed (718 passed), but Vitest collected E2E specs requiring @playwright/test plus Odysseus TAP .mjs files with no Vitest suite. This is pre-existing test configuration debt.
Repository-wide ESLint reports 213 errors and 102 warnings in unrelated files. Focused changed-file ESLint passed with 0 errors and 0 warnings.
